author: QurayshM
text: Group Fit is exactly what I’ve been looking for! I’ve been wanting to level up my swimming and badminton skills for so long, and now I finally can — all thanks to this amazing app!  From the moment I downloaded it, I was impressed by how smooth everything was — from browsing different activities and trainers to booking sessions. No more stressing about where to find a coach or how to schedule a session. It’s all right there, just a few taps away.  If you're looking to pick up a new activity or improve at something you already love, this app makes it fun, simple, and actually exciting. Can’t recommend it enough!

author: HuzMohd
text: I wanted to coach myself for boxing but always had an issue finding the right person with a convenient time slot with Groupfit I can book at my leisure at any venue of my choice. Infact I even have the option to do it with some of my friends and split the tab!!!! This is great. Best of luck.
